landing.title: Welcome to Ontic Strip
landing.heroTitle: Spot how sources cover the same stories
landing.heroDescription: We surface signals from across the web so you can spot coverage gaps and compare publisher integrity.
landing.errorBanner: Live statistics are temporarily unavailable. Refresh the page to try again.
landing.blindspotDescription: Stories with concentrated coverage expose gaps in how the rest of the media covers the same topic.

collect.title: Collect
collect.description: Ingest feeds, documents, and publisher metadata in real time.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.description: Score documents for grounding and integrity with a consistent strip model.

compare.title: Compare
compare.description: Surface publisher contrasts so you can judge coverage imbalances quickly.
